sourceOverview.notes: Gemini 3.x Pro/Flash. TTS: 380+ voices, 75+ languages (WaveNet, Neural2, Studio, Chirp 3 HD). STT: Chirp, 125+ languages.

audit.priceRangeSummary: TTS examples: Standard/WaveNet $4/M chars, Neural2 $16/M, Studio $160/M, Chirp 3 HD $30/M, Instant Custom Voice $60/M, Polyglot preview $16/M. Gemini pricing varies by model/context.
audit.limitsSummary: STT sync: up to 10 MB or ~1 minute; streaming chunks 25 KB and streams up to ~5 minutes; Chirp 3 supports longer audio (up to ~1 hour) but timestamp features are more limited.
audit.regionSummary: Global and regional endpoints. Speech services document regions including us, eu, asia-southeast1, europe-west2, asia-northeast1 depending on feature.
audit.freeTierSummary: Yes for several Cloud Speech/Text-to-Speech quotas and AI Studio experiments; limits vary by service and region.
audit.appIntegrationNotes: Google splits LLM vs speech across AI Studio/Vertex and Cloud Speech/TTS. Normalize provider/service credentials separately.

supplementalResearch.title: 3. Google (US) — LLM ✓ TTS ✓ STT ✓
supplementalResearch.markdown:
### 3. Google (US) — LLM ✓ TTS ✓ STT ✓

**Status:** Active. Two platforms: Google AI Studio (API key auth, free tier) and Vertex AI (service account, enterprise).

**LLM models (Gemini):**

| Model ID | Input $/1M | Output $/1M | Context | Status |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `gemini-3.1-pro-preview` | $2.00 (≤200K) / $4.00 (>200K) | $12.00 / $18.00 | 1M | Preview, paid only |
| `gemini-3-flash-preview` | $0.50 | $3.00 | 1M | Preview |
| `gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview` | $0.25 | $1.50 | 1M | Preview |
| `gemini-2.5-pro` | $1.25 (≤200K) / $2.50 (>200K) | $10.00 / $15.00 | 1M | **Stable GA** |
| `gemini-2.5-flash` | $0.30 | $2.50 | 1M | Stable GA |
| `gemini-2.5-flash-lite` | $0.10 | $0.40 | 1M | Stable GA |

`gemini-2.0-flash` deprecated, retiring June 1, 2026. Batch API: 50% off. Context caching: ~10% of input rate.

**Gemini TTS (via Gemini API):**

| Model ID | Text In $/1M | Audio Out $/1M | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| `gemini-2.5-flash-preview-tts` | $0.50 | $10.00 | 30 speakers, 70-80+ locales |
| `gemini-2.5-pro-preview-tts` | $1.00 | $20.00 | Higher fidelity |

**Cloud TTS pricing:**

| Voice Type | $/1M chars | Free Monthly |
|---|---|---|
| Chirp 3: HD | $30.00 | 1M chars |
| Studio | $160.00 | 1M chars |
| Neural2 | $16.00 | 1M chars |
| WaveNet | $4.00 | 4M chars |
| Standard | $4.00 | 4M chars |

Chirp 3 HD: 30 voice styles across **31+ languages**, partial SSML support. Voice names: `<locale>-Chirp3-HD-<voice>` (e.g., `en-US-Chirp3-HD-Kore`). Instant Custom Voice (cloning): $60/1M chars.

**Cloud STT:**

| Feature | Price |
|---|---|
| Standard (0–500K min) | $0.016/min |
| Dynamic Batch | $0.003/min |
| Medical models | $0.078/min |

Chirp 3 model: **85+ languages**, streaming support. Free tier: 60 min/month. Max sync audio: ~1 min; batch: unlimited. APIs: gRPC and REST.

**Free tier (AI Studio):** No credit card. Full 1M token context. Gemini 2.5 Pro: 5 RPM/100 RPD. Gemini 2.5 Flash: 10 RPM/250 RPD. Data may be used to improve Google products on free tier only. $300 cloud credit for new Google Cloud accounts.

**Datacenters:** Multi-region: us-central1, europe-west4, asia-southeast1, and many more. Full EU data residency on Vertex AI.

**GDPR:** Full compliance on Vertex AI. DPA, CMEK support, SOC 2, ISO 27001. AI Studio paid tier: data NOT used to improve products.

**Integration notes:** Unified `google-genai` SDK for both AI Studio and Vertex AI. OpenAI-compatible endpoint available. gRPC support on Vertex AI. WebSocket for Live API.

---
